Blackmarket Reader

Website: https://blackmarketreader.com
Description: Albion Online web tools for Black Market scanning, crafting, refining, and food/potion profit calculation.

Primary pages:
- https://blackmarketreader.com/
- https://blackmarketreader.com/dashboard
- https://blackmarketreader.com/bm-crafter
- https://blackmarketreader.com/crafting-calculator
- https://blackmarketreader.com/refining-calculator
- https://blackmarketreader.com/food-potion-crafter

Tools:
- Blackmarket Reader Dashboard: live Albion Online Black Market deal discovery and city comparison
- Black Market Crafter: Albion Online crafting route and Black Market profit tool
- Crafting Calculator: Albion Online crafting calculator with material, artefact, return-rate, focus specialization, and market-value logic
- Refining Calculator: Albion Online refining calculator with city prices, focus presets, and fee handling
- Food & Potion Crafter: Albion Online cooking and alchemy profit calculator with ingredient prices, return rate, station fees, focus specializations, and units-sold-per-day

Topic keywords:
- Albion Online tools
- Albion Online crafting calculator
- Albion Online refining calculator
- Albion Online food crafter
- Albion Online potion crafter
- Albion Online cooking calculator
- Albion Online alchemy calculator
- Albion Online Black Market
- Albion Black Market crafter
